summary: Server-only modules (`node:fs`, `node:crypto`, `node:path`, infrastructure adapters, env config) cannot be imported from `'use client'` files in App Router. The browser bundler will either fail to resolve them or ship a broken polyfill that crashes at runtime. This recipe maps to plugin rule `rules-as-tests/no-server-imports-in-client` (R12).
bestPractices: Pass server-side data into client components via props from a parent Server Component.
Wrap server resources in adapter modules that are only imported from server boundaries.
Mark client-only files explicitly with `'use client'` at the top — within the first 3 lines.
antiPatterns: `import fs from 'node:fs'` from a `'use client'` file.
`import { db } from '@/infrastructure/db'` from a client component.
Reading `process.env` or filesystem APIs from a `'use client'` module.
